Interface IuOidcPrincipal

All Superinterfaces:
Principal
public interface IuOidcPrincipal extends Principal
Client application view of principal user identity established via interaction with an OIDC provider.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getAccessToken(URI resourceUri)
    Gets an access token issued to this principal for use with a given remote resource.
    <T> T
    getClaim(String name, Class<T> type)
    Gets a claim value.
    edu.iu.jwt.WebToken
    getIdToken()
    Gets the verified ID token for this principal.
    String
    getSetCookie()
    Updated session cookie, populated if a state change was required while resolving the principal.

    Methods inherited from interface Principal

    equals, getName, hashCode, implies, toString

  • Method Details

    • getSetCookie

      String getSetCookie()
      Updated session cookie, populated if a state change was required while resolving the principal.
      Returns:
      Set-Cookie header value

    • getIdToken

      edu.iu.jwt.WebToken getIdToken()
      Gets the verified ID token for this principal.
      Returns:
      WebToken ID token

    • getClaim

      <T> T getClaim(String name, Class<T> type)
      Gets a claim value.
      Type Parameters:
      T - claim value type
      Parameters:
      name - claim name
      type - claim type
      Returns:
      claim value, from userinfo if available; else from ID token

    • getAccessToken

      String getAccessToken(URI resourceUri)
      Gets an access token issued to this principal for use with a given remote resource.
      Parameters:
      resourceUri - root resource URI for the API to get an access token for
      Returns:
      access token for use at the indicated resource URI
